channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla March car registrations soar in key European markets
item.description: STORY: New registrations of Tesla cars more than tripled in France in March to just shy of a two-year-old record high. And they doubled in the Nordic countries. The data released on Wednesday is the latest sign of the EV giant's sales recovery in Europe.

item.title: Tesla Q1 deliveries likely to dip sequentially as EV demand softens
item.description: April 1 (Reuters) - Tesla's first-quarter deliveries are expected to be lower than in the December quarter as the electric-vehicle maker struggles with uneven demand and intensifying competition in

item.title: Tesla: This Is Not The Right Time To Buy The Dip
Billionaire Ken Griffin Buys 2 AI Stocks Chasing a $1 Trillion Market Opportunity in Robotaxis (Hint: Not Tesla)
item.description: Ken Griffin's hedge fund recently bought stock in Nvidia and Amazon.

item.title: Trending tickers: Nike, Tesla, Nvidia, Oracle and Berkeley
item.description: The latest investor updates on stocks that are trending on Wednesday

item.title: Americans Are Warming Up to Robotaxis -- and That's Big News for Alphabet and Tesla
item.description: We're at the dawn of a new frontier in transportation.

item.title: Elon Musk hints at “official ceremony” with throwback photo to close Tesla Model S, Model X chapter
item.description: Tesla has officially begun winding down production of the Model S and Model X, sending farewell emails to U.S. customers on March 27 and updating the website to reflect the end of the line. Shoppers visiting Tesla.com now find only a limited set of Model S and Model X inventory units available fo...

item.title: The Tesla Model S And Model X Are Officially Dead
item.description: It’s the end of the road for the cars that set the standards for truly modern EVs, with plenty of range, comfort, and performance.

item.title: Custom orders of the Tesla Model S & X have come to an end. All that’s left are some in inventory.
item.description: https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2039202381683110191?s=20 submitted by /u/rcnfive [link] [comments]

item.title: Why Tesla (TSLA) Stock Is Up Today
item.description: Shares of electric vehicle pioneer Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) jumped 4.2% in the afternoon session after CEO Elon Musk announced a 'big' investment in Japan to expand the company's service infrastructure and Supercharger network.

item.title: CyberCabs in the wild. NorCal
item.description: Seen in Santa Clara, California today. Steering wheel and driver was in the car. Anyone know what the additional apparatus is for submitted by /u/AlfaHolic4Life [link] [comments]

item.title: Rivian Stock Is Cheap, but Does That Make It a Buy Now?
item.description: Rivian stock trades at a huge discount to Tesla.

item.title: Tesla Q1 deliveries rise 9% amid Robotaxi focus
item.description: Yahoo Finance senior autos reporter Pras Subramanian joins Asking for a Trend host Josh Lipton to discuss expectations for Tesla's ((TSLA) Q1 global deliveries.

item.title: When Will Elon Musk's Tesla And SpaceX Merge? Here's What Prediction Market Is Saying
item.description: Elon Musk's xAI and SpaceX merged in February, valuing the company at over $1.25 trillion. SpaceX is now preparing for an initial public offering (IPO). SpaceX IPO SpaceX reportedly plans to raise $75 billion from its IPO, valuing the space exploration company at around $1.75 trillion.

item.title: Stock Market Today, March 31: Tesla Rises Ahead of Delivery Report as Rally Eases Demand Concerns
item.description: Tesla rose as the market rallied, with focus turning to its delivery report and whether weaker vehicle demand will test the stock’s recent rebound.

item.title: Elon Musk announces disappointing Tesla Optimus update
item.description: Elon Musk announced a disappointing update to the unveiling of Tesla Optimus and its third-generation iteration, missing a timeline it aimed to hit in the first quarter of the year. Musk has confirmed that the highly anticipated Optimus Gen 3 humanoid robot is already walking around and operation...

item.title: Gary Black Says TSLA Has Underperformed Nasdaq For 5 Years Because It Has Never Lived Up To Unsupervised FSD Hype: 'TSLA Still Has Only 9 Robotaxis'
item.description: Investor Gary Black of The Future Fund LLC has criticized Tesla Inc. for underperforming the Nasdaq 100 index for the last five years, which he thinks happened due to the brand not living up to the Full Self-Driving (FSD) promises. Unsupervised FSD Hype On Sunday, the investor shared his criticis...

item.title: Tesla expands unsupervised ‘Robotaxi’ area in Austin with only a handful of cars
item.description: Tesla has expanded the geofence for its unsupervised “Robotaxi” service in Austin, Texas, growing the area where vehicles can operate without a safety monitor inside the car. But social media sightings indicate that only a handful of vehicles — somewhere between 4 and 8 Model Ys — are actually ru...

item.title: Tesla charging in Texas… with cows watching. Can’t get more Texas than this.
item.description: Stopped to charge and looked up to see literal cows behind the Superchargers. Felt like the most Texas thing I’ve ever seen. Future meets farmland submitted by /u/AppointmentOk5903 [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Surges 5%: Delivery Hopes, Terafab, and SpaceX Buzz Are All Converging at Once
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) shares are up 5% in Tuesday’s session, trading around $373 after opening at $355.28. Three distinct catalysts landed within the same 24-hour window, and the market is treating their convergence as meaningful. That kind of stacked narrative is rare, and it explains why the move...

item.title: Is E*Trade About to Cut Robinhood and SoFi Out of the SpaceX IPO?
item.description: A recent Reuters report suggested retail investors on popular brokerages Robinhood and SoFi wouldn't be able to buy SpaceX shares at the IPO price when it goes public.

item.title: Market Chatter: SpaceX's $75 Billion IPO Draws Investor Focus
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) CEO Elon Musk's SpaceX is preparing to launch its initial public offering, with about $

item.title: Why Nvidia And Tesla Are Suddenly Knocking On Samsung's Door
item.description: A severe capacity crunch at Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Ltd. is forcing major clients, including Nvidia Corp. and Tesla Inc., to seek alternatives, positioning Samsung Electronics Co.

item.title: Meta’s (META) CEO Mark Zuckerberg is Developing an AI Agent to Help Him be CEO Tesla and SpaceX Plan to Build a New Chip Factory in Texas
item.description: Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ:META) is one of the Goldman Sachs AI Stocks: Top 12 Stocks to Buy. On March 22, 2026, the Wall Street Journal reported that Mark Zuckerberg, CEO of Meta Platforms, Inc.

item.title: Tesla (TESLA) and SpaceX Plan to Build a New Chip Factory in Texas
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the Goldman Sachs AI Stocks: Top 12 Stocks to Buy. On March 23, 2026, Reuters reported that CEO Elon Musk said the day before that Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Tesla's First Quarter 2026 EV Sales: Analysts Project Modest Gains
item.description: Wall Street is expecting a Q1 sales bump for Tesla. But projections for 2026 and the rest of the decade have been sharply lowered.

item.title: Tesla named on Iran’s 18-company target list threatening Gulf operations
item.description: Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has named Tesla among 18 US companies whose Middle East operations it is threatening to attack in retaliation for the killings of Iranian military leaders. The threat carries an explicit deadline: 8:00 PM Tehran time on April 1. Tesla has been rapid...

item.title: Countdown: America is going back to the Moon and SpaceX holds the key to what comes after
item.description: For the first time since Apollo 17 touched down on the lunar surface in December 1972, the United States is sending humans back toward the Moon. NASA’s Artemis II mission is set to launch as early as this week from Kennedy Space Center in Florida, carrying four astronauts on a 10-day journey arou...

item.title: Elon Musk Says This About Tesla's Optimus Release And SpaceX IPO
item.description: Elon Musk suggested Tesla has had to push back the unveiling of its latest Optimus robot. Tesla stock rose amid a market bounce.

item.title: Elon Musk debunks latest rumors about SpaceX IPO
item.description: Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk debunked the latest rumors about the space exploration company’s initial public offering (IPO), which has been the subject of a wide array of speculation over the last few weeks. With SpaceX likely heading to Wall Street to become a publicly-traded stock in the comi...

item.title: Why Is Tesla Stock Rising Today
item.description: Tesla Stock Edges Higher With Market. Robotaxi and AI Drive Interest

item.title: Cathie Wood Adds 48K Shares to This Under-the-Radar Growth Play
item.description: Wood trimmed stakes in Nvidia, Meta, and Tesla; instead, she added this speculative biotech play.

item.title: Musk's Legal Battle Just Took A New Turn
item.description: Judge steps aside after bias concerns surface

item.title: Bernie Sanders Accuses Elon Musk Of Paying 'Tax Rate Of Less Than 3.3%' As Tesla CEO's Wealth Soars To $637 Billion
item.description: On Sunday, Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.) took to X to accuse Tesla Inc. and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk of paying "an effective tax rate of less than 3.3%" Sanders Alleges Unfair Tax Practices "Elon Musk, the wealthiest man alive, recently paid an effective tax rate of less than 3.3%.

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises. Electric Cars Still Matter—Believe It or Not.
item.description: Investors seem to have forgotten that Tesla makes cars. Tesla is due to report first-quarter delivery numbers on Thursday. Coming into Tuesday trading, Tesla stock was up 37% over the past 12 months and 102% over the past two years, despite falling EV sales and earnings estimates.

item.title: Elon Musk says the US could be ‘toast’ if AI doesn’t fix America’s $39T nightmare — how to protect your money
item.description: According to Musk, the numbers just don't add up.

item.title: Tesla showroom in Sydney torched in suspected arson, 3 vehicles destroyed
item.description: A Tesla showroom in Parramatta, a suburb of Sydney, Australia, was set ablaze in an overnight attack that destroyed three vehicles and damaged the building. Jerrycan lids were found at the scene. The fire is being investigated as a suspected arson — the latest in a global wave of attacks on Tesla...

item.title: Tesla Call Feels Like A Reality Check
item.description: Deliveries edge higher, but valuation resets

item.title: Should You 'Buy' or 'Sell' Tesla Stock Now?
item.description: Tesla Stock Under Pressure as Growth Bets Raise Risk Concerns

item.title: Tesla Q1 deliveries expected to rebound slightly in challenging EV landscape
item.description: Tesla will release first quarter deliveries on Thursday, with another slip in sales expected in a challenging EV landscape.

item.title: Chinese-owned Halms to build new car parts plant in Hungary
item.description: The Miskolc facility will supply global automakers including BMW, Volvo, Tesla and Jaguar, producing aluminium castings, engine blocks and other components.

item.title: How The Tesla (TSLA) Story Is Shifting Between Autonomy Hopes And Profitability Risks
item.description: Tesla’s modeled fair value price target has been adjusted slightly, moving to about US$421.27 from US$421.61, signaling only a very small shift in the underlying assumptions. Research firms linking their targets to this new figure are weighing upbeat views on autonomy, robotaxis, and energy again...

item.title: Rivian and Lucid can operate like Tesla after new legislative win
item.description: Tesla has always occupied a special place in the U.S. automotive landscape as one of the few original equipment manufacturers that does not have to adhere to state dealership franchise laws that have been in place for decades, but now rivals EV Rivian and Lucid are getting the same treatment in a...

item.title: Tesla charging session
item.description: While charging today I Seen this cybercab, I never knew this was a thing! I will take my older model S with the free charging for life any day of the week. submitted by /u/K-Lew510 [link] [comments]

item.title: How Much Further Could Tesla Stock Fall?
item.description: Even as the electric-car maker's operating margins are shrinking, the stock remains priced for perfection.

item.title: Tesla Optimus Gen 3 is coming to the Tesla Diner with new ambitions
item.description: Tesla’s Optimus robot was one of the most talked-about features when the Tesla Diner opened on Santa Monica Boulevard in Hollywood on July 21, 2025. Dubbed “Poptimus” by Tesla fans, the Gen 2 robot stood upstairs at the retro-futuristic, drive-in theater and Tesla Supercharging station, scooping ...

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq Falls After Trump, Powell Comments; Micron, Nvidia, Palantir, Tesla Are Key Losers
item.description: Dow Jones Futures: Stocks ended mixed Monday amid comments from President Trump and Fed Chair Powell. Oil prices rallied while Micron dived.

item.title: Ross Gerber: Tesla Ending Production of 'Two Best Vehicles of All Time'
item.description: On Saturday, Tesla Inc. drew fresh attention after Gerber Kawasaki Wealth & Investment Management CEO Ross Gerber said he received an email saying production of the Model S and Model X is ending, calling the two vehicles the "best vehicles of all time." The note lands as Gerber has also been urgi...

item.title: Stock Market Today, March 30: Tesla Slides on EV Pricing Pressure as Investors Await Q1 2026 Delivery Data
item.description: Today, March 30, 2026, investors are weighing EV price cuts against an ambitious AI and robotaxi pivot shaping this market story.

item.title: Prediction: Elon Musk Will Merge Tesla With SpaceX Within 5 Years
item.description: The move seems inevitable given Musk's long-term ambitions.
